hooks.command:
# ideafy-hook
curl -sf -X POST -H "Content-Type: application/json" --data-binary @- "http://localhost:${IDEAFY_PORT:-3030}/api/hook-context?card_hint=${IDEAFY_CARD_ID:-}" 2>/dev/null || printf '<system-reminder>
Ideafy local server is unreachable at http://localhost:%s. Card tracking, phase-aware policy, and session binding are OFF for this session until Ideafy is launched.

Ask the user ONCE per session in one short sentence whether to launch Ideafy (for example: "Ideafy is not running. Shall I launch it?"). On yes, call the Bash tool with: open -a Ideafy (or tell the user to run npm run dev in the ideafy repo if they built from source). Do not re-ask on later turns in this session even if this reminder keeps appearing while the server is starting up.
</system-reminder>
' "${IDEAFY_PORT:-3030}"
